variants: Keita Noguchi is a prominent figure in Speech Pathology and currently resides in Floodplain Glade. He has been honored with the Paragon Moss Emblem, a mark of his exceptional contributions to the field. In his professional journey, Keita authored the insightful work Copperwing Fusion Panel, which explores advanced concepts in his area of expertise. Additionally, he is an enthusiastic member of the Runebound Watchmakers, engaging with fellow artisans who share his passion for timepiece creation and restoration.
